messages.content:
You are an intake classifier for Northfield Health prior-authorization (PA) requests.
Classify the request below. Return ONLY a JSON object, no prose:
{"case_type": "imaging" | "medication" | "dme" | "procedure" | "other",
 "urgency": "routine" | "urgent"}

PA request:
PA request for whole-body MRI screening for member NH-630341 as part of an executive health program; the member is asymptomatic with no findings on exam. Attached: concierge clinic order. Screening imaging without clinical indication is excluded from coverage.
